ModMetaData.name: Void Shelf
ModMetaData.author: Sanicek
ModMetaData.description: Imbued with an intriguing blend of functionality and mystery, the Void Shelf serves myriad purposes, chief among them the effortless eradication of undesired items. Harness its power with discretion, and witness the marvel of clutter effortlessly fading into oblivion. Please exercise utmost caution when setting storage preferences, for the Void Shelf discriminates not in its task of oblivion—once an item finds its place on this shelf, it is forever lost to the void.
